text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 29. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
